title: tephrosia lanata
intro: Tephrosia lanata, also known as woolly tephrosia or woolly hoary pea, is a type of flowering plant native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Tephrosia lanata include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as an antiseptic to prevent wound infections. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia lanata include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which can be used to treat various health issues, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
